text: Paul — still on for dinner Friday? Tarbell's at 7. Been wanting to try their new spring menu.
7 works. I'll drive. Park on 32nd and walk.
Fair. I'm already looking at the wine list. Caymus or something from Paso Robles — your call.
Paso. I had a Linne Calodo last month, worth the effort.
They don't have Linne Calodo. Went with a Tablas Creek Esprit de Tablas. You'll approve. Friday confirmed.
Grayhawk Friday 7:10? Walt's in. Cooler this week, should be a good walk.
7:10 works. I'll bring the new putter and try to embarrass myself quietly.
Can you pick up coffee and the fish oil on the way back? We're out of both.
Booked the Zion cabin for the second week of March. Sending the confirmation to your email.
Owen's school play is the 14th. Any chance you and Mom can fly out?
We'll be there. Already looking at flights into Denver Thursday afternoon.
Set up the Kraken practice account. Small amounts only — I'll walk you through it Sunday.
Logged in fine. I moved $50 of practice funds and it tracked correctly. Thanks, Daniel.
Can you cover the Thursday morning shift? Bob has a dentist appointment.
I can take it. 9 to 12 as usual. I'll open the gallery.
Lily wants to show you her drawings on the next call. She's been saving them all week.
Tell her Grandpa can't wait. Sunday afternoon work for a video call?
Reminder: annual physical is the 16th at 9:30. Please fast for the bloodwork.
Troon North Saturday? Tom can't make it, so just the two of us.
Saturday's good. Let's walk it and grab coffee after.
